1→"""Dispatch logic for consolidate-learn-plans workflow via RemoteGitHub REST API. 2→ 3→Creates a branch, draft PR, and dispatches the consolidate-learn-plans workflow 4→entirely via the GitHub REST API. 330→ # Sort: branch activity only available with local repo 331→ if sort == "activity" and not isinstance(ctx.repo, NoRepoSentinel): 332→ sort_key = SortKey.BRANCH_ACTIVITY 333→ activity_by_plan = provider.fetch_branch_activity(rows) 334→ rows = sort_plans(rows, sort_key, activity_by_plan=activity_by_plan) 335→ else: 336→ sort_key = SortKey.PLAN_ID 337→ rows = sort_plans(rows, sort_key) 338→ 339→ if json_mode: 340→ plans = [serialize_plan_row(row) for row in rows] 341→ return PrListResult(plans=plans, count=len(plans)) 342→ 343→ table = _build_static_table(rows, show_pr_column=False) 344→

session.assistant: I see that the code compares `sort == "activity"` and defaults to PLAN_ID otherwise. The sort value `"plan"` is only compared as "not activity" (else branch). So changing the Choice and default from `"plan"` to `"pr"` is safe — the else branch still catches it. Let me also update the docstring and the comparison locations:

        + f"Invalid plan number or URL: {identifier}\n\n"
        + "Expected formats:\n"
        + "  • Plain number: 123\n"
        + "  • P-prefixed: P123\n"
        + "  • GitHub URL: https://github.com/owner/repo/issues/456"
    )","new_string":"    user_output(
        click.style("Error: ", fg="red")
        + f"Invalid PR number or URL: {identifier}\n\n"
        + "Expected formats:\n"
        + "  • Plain number: 123\n"
        + "  • P-prefixed: P123\n"
        + "  • GitHub URL: https://github.com/owner/repo/issues/456"
    )"}
[Tool: Edit] {"file_path":"/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/pr/create_cmd.py","old_string":"    # Validate content is not empty
    Ensure.not_empty(content.strip(), "Plan content is empty. Provide a non-empty plan.")","new_string":"    # Validate content is not empty
    Ensure.not_empty(content.strip(), "PR content is empty. Provide a non-empty PR body.")"}
[Tool: Edit] {"file_path":"/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/pr/create_cmd.py","old_string":"    # Display success message with next steps
    user_output(f"Created plan #{result.pr_number}")
    user_output("")
    user_output(f"Plan: {result.pr_url}")
    user_output(f"Branch: {result.branch_name}")
    user_output("")","new_string":"    # Display success message with next steps
    user_output(f"Created PR #{result.pr_number}")
    user_output("")
    user_output(f"PR: {result.pr_url}")
    user_output(f"Branch: {result.branch_name}")
    user_output("")"}
[Tool: Edit] {"file_path":"/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/pr/list_cmd.py","old_string":"    if not rows:
        if json_mode:
            return PrListResult(plans=[], count=0)
        user_output("No plans found matching the criteria.")
        return None","new_string":"    if not rows:
        if json_mode:
            return PrListResult(plans=[], count=0)
        user_output("No PRs found matching the criteria.")
        return None"}
[Tool: Edit] {"file_path":"/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/pr/list_cmd.py","old_string":"    table = _build_static_table(rows, show_pr_column=False)

    user_output(f"\nFound {len(rows)} plan(s):\n")
    console = Console(stderr=True, width=200, force_terminal=True)
    console.print(table)
    console.print()
    return None","new_string":"    table = _build_static_table(rows, show_pr_column=False)

    user_output(f"\nFound {len(rows)} PR(s):\n")
    console = Console(stderr=True, width=200, force_terminal=True)
    console.print(table)
    console.print()
    return None"}
[Tool: Edit] {"file_path":"/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/branch/create_cmd.py","old_string":"    if for_plan is not None and branch_name is not None:
        user_output(
            "Error: Cannot specify both BRANCH and --for-plan.\n"
            "Use --for-plan to derive branch name from plan, or provide BRANCH directly."
        )
        raise SystemExit(1) from None","new_string":"    if for_plan is not None and branch_name is not None:
        user_output(
            "Error: Cannot specify both BRANCH and --for-plan.\n"
            "Use --for-plan to derive branch name from PR, or provide BRANCH directly."
        )
        raise SystemExit(1) from None"}
[Tool: Edit] {"file_path":"/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/branch/create_cmd.py","old_string":"        plan_number = parse_issue_identifier(for_plan)
        result = ctx.plan_store.get_plan(repo.root, str(plan_number))
        if isinstance(result, PlanNotFound):
            raise click.ClickException(f"Plan #{plan_number} not found")
        plan = result","new_string":"        plan_number = parse_issue_identifier(for_plan)
        result = ctx.plan_store.get_plan(repo.root, str(plan_number))
        if isinstance(result, PlanNotFound):
            raise click.ClickException(f"PR #{plan_number} not found")
        plan = result"}
[Tool: Edit] {"file_path":"/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/branch/create_cmd.py","old_string":"    if setup is not None:
        # Plan branch was created by plan-save, so it's expected to exist
        if branch_exists_locally:
            user_output(f"Checking out plan branch: {branch_name}")","new_string":"    if setup is not None:
        # Plan branch was created by plan-save, so it's expected to exist
        if branch_exists_locally:
            user_output(f"Checking out PR branch: {branch_name}")"}

[Tool: Edit] {"file_path":"/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/branch/checkout_cmd.py","old_string":"    # Mutual exclusivity validation
    if for_plan is not None and branch is not None:
        user_output(
            "Error: Cannot specify both BRANCH and --for-plan.\n"
            "Use --for-plan to derive branch name from plan, or provide BRANCH directly."
        )
        raise SystemExit(1) from None","new_string":"    # Mutual exclusivity validation
    if for_plan is not None and branch is not None:
        user_output(
            "Error: Cannot specify both BRANCH and --for-plan.\n"
            "Use --for-plan to derive branch name from PR, or provide BRANCH directly."
        )
        raise SystemExit(1) from None"}
